Explore Our Programs

Smart Banker Program

A 3-month online training program focused on making you job-ready with banking skills, certifications, and placement assistance, offering entry-level banking roles with ₹2.4-3.6 LPA for those wanting a flexible learning option.

AVERAGE SALARY RANGE ₹ 2.4 to 3.5 LPA
DURATION 3 Months
Know More Enquire Now

Aurix Bankers Program

An intensive 1-month training program designed in partnership with AU Small Finance Bank. Tailored for ambitious graduates of Age Upto 26 years, this program equips you to step confidently into the Bank Officer role opportunity. Gain professional training and practical exposure through a paid on-the-job internship in AU Bank Branch.

GUARANTEED SALARY ₹ 3.5 LPA + Incentives
DURATION 3 Months
Know More Enquire Now

What Makes TrueKnack Unique

TrueKnack offers a promising employment landscape, as blue-chip banks consistently hire our trained talent.

ISO 9001:2015 Certified Institute

NSDC Approved Training Partner

Training by Ex Senior Bankers

Interactive Training Sessions

Doubt Clearing Sessions

Latest Syllabi as per Banking Industry

NISM VA Exam Preparation

100% Placement Assistance

Checkout Our Blogs

Keep updated with corporate banking patterns, job guidelines, and interview tips.

Why Retail Banking is a Good Career Option in India?

The retail banking sector in India is experiencing robust growth, offering high job stability, rapid promotions, and diverse career paths for graduates.

Read More

What is retail banking: Types, Functions, and Scope

Understand the core operations, liability and asset products, types of institutions, and digital scope of consumer banking.

Read More

Top Retail Banking Interview Questions and Answers

Review critical compliance, domain knowledge, and situation-handling questions frequently asked during hiring drives.
